column1: # Each row declares that an external check's rule and an engine check code are
# the SAME verdict: the external rule fires exactly when the engine code fires.
# The harness uses this to translate a case's captured external fired-rule set
# into the engine's code vocabulary before diffing it against the engine's live
# Rules that are NOT the same verdict (a deliberate divergence) do not belong
# here -- they are recorded per case in divergences.tsv instead.
